name: Apaches
description: The Apaches were a Puerto Rican gang that hung out on the corner of Pacific and Nevins Streets in Brooklyn's Boerum Hill neighborhood, close to the Gowanus Projects. They were a Puerto Rican gang with a presence near the Gowanus Projects and had interactions with other local gangs such as the Mau Maus and South Brooklyn Boys in the late 1950s.
